heading: ## Scenario: installed Driver exposes the eight livespec:* commands
reason: Seeded when check-heading-coverage was wired into this Codex binding repo. Per the scenarios.md rule the eventual mapped test MUST be integration-tier or above; until one is authored this behavior is exercised by the e2e-cli consumer harness (tests/e2e-cli/, the top-of-pyramid tier) and the structural / hook gates. heading: ## Scenario: /skills picker exposes plugin skills by short name
reason: Top-of-pyramid live Codex TUI acceptance for the human discovery path: starts the real Codex TUI, opens /skills, chooses List skills, searches the short name drive, and requires the rendered Skill row to include the livespec-orchestrator-beads-fabro plugin context.
